decision.summary: Hold the near-certain 69k No position and open a new bearish-aligned 66k dip Yes position for March 28.
decision.rationale: The existing No on 'Will Bitcoin reach $69,000 on March 27?' is already at 1.0 and qualifies for the take-profit exception to be held into natural resolution. Beecthor’s latest transcript and summary remain bearish overall, with 65k as decisive support and further downside favored if weakness persists, while Binance still shows negative 24h structure with BTC at 66262.02. Under the updated playbook hard rule and nearest-strike-first order, the closest bearish market below price is 'Will Bitcoin dip to $66,000 on March 28?' and its Yes probability is 76%, which is within the mandatory 45%-85% range and aligned with the thesis, so it must be opened.

details.market: Will Bitcoin dip to $66,000 on March 28?
